task_description: Phase 23: Frontend Wire-up - Replace all mock/hardcoded data in 27 pages across 7 apps with real API calls. Add TanStack Query, create typed hooks per app, rewrite pages to use hooks with loading/error/empty states, add error boundaries, remove all mock data generators from hooks.

verification.summary: All gates pass: typecheck 82/82, test 84/84 (all pass). Review issues resolved: rewrote quantmax useFeed/useMatching/useLive/useCreator to use React Query + apiClient, fixed matching.tsx API mismatch, removed dead useForYouFeed, created useShows for quantube shows.tsx, removed as-any casts in quantchat/quantmail/quantneon.
